[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01001111 5
1 11001000 3
2 00111000 3
3 11101111 7
4 10110111 6
5 11111111 a
6 01111111 7
7 11011011 6

01 10 11111111 a match 5
12 21 11111111 a match 5
23 32 11011111 7
34 43 11001111 6
45 54 11111000 5
56 65 00111110 5
67 76 10111111 7
70 07 11111111 a match 5

02 20 11111111 a match 5
13 31 01111111 7 match 6
24 42 11011011 6 match 7
35 53 01111111 7 match 6
46 64 11001110 5
57 75 10111111 7
60 06 11101111 7 match 3
71 17 10110111 6 match 4

03 30 11101111 7 match 3
14 41 11111110 7
25 52 11111011 7
36 63 01001111 5 match 0
47 74 11111111 a match 5
50 05 11111101 7
61 16 00111110 5
72 27 11111111 a match 5

04 40 11101101 6
15 51 00111110 5
26 62 11011111 7
37 73 11111111 a match 5
